title: Smoky Apple Crumble
description: A classic dessert with smoky undertones from the roasted apples, topped with a crunchy crumble.
instructions: Toss sliced apples with granulated sugar, flour, and a pinch of salt in a large mixing bowl.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix crumbled butter with smoky oats until well combined.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the apple mixture.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
